name: Excelsior Biopharma Inc.
summary: Excelsior Biopharma Inc. develops pharmaceutical products in Taiwan. The company offers prescription drugs, over-the-counter drugs, medical devices, healthcare food products, medical supplies, and skin products. It provides its products for the therapeutic areas, such as pediatrics, gastroenterology, neurology, cardiology, dermatology, medical toxicology, dentistry, obstetrics and gynecology, anesthesiology, orthopedics, neonatology, oncology, pulmonary medicine, nephology, and others, etc. The company also offers test kits under the Actim name to detect inflected C-reactive protein, influenza virus, colorectal cancer, acute pancreatitis, preterm birth, and early water-breaking. In addition, it provides oral care products, including oral cleansing toothpaste, mouthwash and gel; and health food and cosmetic products. Excelsior Biopharma Inc. also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Excelsior Enterprise Co., Ltd. Excelsior Biopharma Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
